# gss_indicate_mechs(_:_:)

**Function**

Returns the list of supported underlying security mechanisms.

## Declaration

```swift
func gss_indicate_mechs(_ minor_status: UnsafeMutablePointer<OM_uint32>, _ mech_set: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_OID_set?>) -> OM_uint32
```

## Parameters

- **minor_status**: A pointer to the secondary status result that provides additional information in case of failure.
- **mech_set**: A pointer the function uses to output the available set of mechanism identifiers. Release the set with a call to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_release_oid_set(_:_:)] when you are done with it.

## Return Value

A status code set to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_COMPLETE] on completion.

## Queries

- **gss_indicate_mechs_by_attrs(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns the set of mechanisms that fulfill the given criteria.
- **gss_display_mech_attr(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns a human-readable name and description of a mechanism attribute.
- **gss_inquire_attrs_for_mech(_:_:_:_:)**: Returns the supported attributes for one or all mechanisms.
- **gss_inquire_mech_for_saslname(_:_:_:)**: Returns the GSS-API mechanism identifier for a given Simple Authentication and Security Layer (SASL) protocol name.
- **gss_inquire_saslname_for_mech(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns the Simple Authentication and Security Layer (SASL) protocol name for a given GSS-API mechanism.
